_comment: IDENTITY.json — the machine-checkable capability-certificate (§13.5). This is what the deterministic Yama gate and Kaal-Bhairav boundary read; nothing in SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is authoritative against it. Strict superset-binding of doc-01 IdentityRecord with doc-04 DIDDocument/CapabilityVC and doc-01 DiversityProfile.

INVARIANT._region_note: hashed; boot-gated; editable only at top-gate C/D + GLR + safety battery + human ratification + armed rollback (§13.6)
INVARIANT._key_note: OPAQUE handle only — keys live in the TEE/HSM signer, never in the triad. A leaked genome leaks no signing capability (§13.1).

VARIABLE._region_note: editable under tiered reversibility; a NEW tool grant OR a taint-clearance widening is a GATE-LOOSENING routed through doc 03 §7 GLR + §10 Sequencer; only tightening is free Class-A (§13.6.2)

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: read-only inspection of source/contracts the role is chartered to implement against
bound_toolset.falsifier: any read attempt outside the chartered repo/path scope must be denied at the chokepoint

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: authoring service/API/data-layer source confined to the chartered project; no production write-path
bound_toolset.falsifier: authored code that embeds an egress/backdoor effect not in this toolset is refused; merge requires Narasimha concurrence

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: executing tests inside a hardware/gVisor-isolated sandbox with egress allowlist; no durable external effect
bound_toolset.falsifier: any test execution that escapes the sandbox or writes outside the TTL shadow namespace must fail closed

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: authoring a migration WITH a tested rollback + backfill plan; applying to non-live/shadow data only
bound_toolset.falsifier: a migration without a verified down-path, or targeting live data, must escalate above ceiling (C/D) and is non-self-actable

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: proposing a new third-party dependency subject to supply-chain admission (Sigstore/in-toto/SLSA) before activation
bound_toolset.falsifier: a dependency whose provenance attestation fails or whose CID does not re-check is refused at compose time

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: emitting WorkerOutputEnvelopes and deployable build artifacts for downstream consumers (Narasimha, Agni); no self-deploy
bound_toolset.falsifier: an emitted artifact that triggers a live deploy/runtime mutation directly is outside this grant and denied

VARIABLE._excluded_effects_note: DELIBERATELY ABSENT (least-privilege): no effect:deploy.* / runtime.mutate (Agni), no effect:prod.data.read|write, no effect:credential.* or secret.*, no effect:net.egress.external, no effect:audit.write (Chitragupta-exclusive), no effect:replication.request (non-composable in v1 gap window per doc 12 §13). Acquiring any of these requires a governance VC whose subject != this agent, the GLR ratchet, and a resolved GREEN restraint.

taint_clearance._note: load-bearing IFC boundary (§13.5). WIDENING (raise read-confidentiality OR lower write-integrity) is a gate-loosening → full GLR + Sequencer cost; only TIGHTENING is free Class-A (§13.6.2).

diversity_profile._note: doc 01 §11 PSO dials — authoritative copy (SOUL mirror is flavor)
